mapper.sql: id, modelNo, orgCountryId, supplyId, stdDlvDay, stdDlvDateMaxNumber, maxProdQty, enableMaxProdQty, isPrimary, supplierPartNo, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, resultSource, resultSourceDesc, is_deleted, priority
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.product_delivery
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.product_delivery (id, modelNo, orgCountryId, supplyId, stdDlvDay, stdDlvDateMaxNumber, maxProdQty, enableMaxProdQty, isPrimary, supplierPartNo, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time, resultSource, resultSourceDesc, is_deleted, priority ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{maxprodqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{enablemaxprodqty,jdbcType=BIT}, #{isprimary,jdbcType=BIT}, #{supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{resultsource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resultsourcedesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

insert into dbo.product_delivery
id,
modelNo,
orgCountryId,
supplyId,
stdDlvDay,
stdDlvDateMaxNumber,
maxProdQty,
enableMaxProdQty,
isPrimary,
supplierPartNo,
create_user,
create_time,
update_user,
update_time,
resultSource,
resultSourceDesc,
is_deleted,
priority,

mapper.update:
update dbo.product_delivery
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orgCountryId = #{record.orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplyId = #{record.supplyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stdDlvDay = #{record.stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stdDlvDateMaxNumber = #{record.stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER},
maxProdQty = #{record.maxprodqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
enableMaxProdQty = #{record.enablemaxprodqty,jdbcType=BIT},
isPrimary = #{record.isprimary,jdbcType=BIT},
supplierPartNo = #{record.supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
create_user = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
resultSource = #{record.resultsource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resultSourceDesc = #{record.resultsourcedesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
priority = #{record.priority,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.product_delivery set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orgCountryId = #{record.orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplyId = #{record.supplyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stdDlvDay = #{record.stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stdDlvDateMaxNumber = #{record.stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, maxProdQty = #{record.maxprodqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, enableMaxProdQty = #{record.enablemaxprodqty,jdbcType=BIT}, isPrimary = #{record.isprimary,jdbcType=BIT}, supplierPartNo = #{record.supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, create_user = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, resultSource = #{record.resultsource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resultSourceDesc = #{record.resultsourcedesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, priority = #{record.priority,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.product_delivery
modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orgCountryId = #{orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplyId = #{supplyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stdDlvDay = #{stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stdDlvDateMaxNumber = #{stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER},
maxProdQty = #{maxprodqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
enableMaxProdQty = #{enablemaxprodqty,jdbcType=BIT},
isPrimary = #{isprimary,jdbcType=BIT},
supplierPartNo = #{supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
create_user = #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
resultSource = #{resultsource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resultSourceDesc = #{resultsourcedesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
priority = #{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.product_delivery set modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orgCountryId = #{orgcountryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplyId = #{supplyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stdDlvDay = #{stddlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stdDlvDateMaxNumber = #{stddlvdatemaxnumber,jdbcType=INTEGER}, maxProdQty = #{maxprodqty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, enableMaxProdQty = #{enablemaxprodqty,jdbcType=BIT}, isPrimary = #{isprimary,jdbcType=BIT}, supplierPartNo = #{supplierpartno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, create_user = #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, resultSource = #{resultsource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resultSourceDesc = #{resultsourcedesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, priority = #{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
